title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Listen, runt.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...flock to this ship day after day.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And they all hope to work for red leg Zeff.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were cook's apprentice on a dinky boat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: H-Hey! I've had plenty of practice too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hiya... lean

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh yeah? How many years of real experience, Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A little over two years?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just you wait! One day I'm gonna kick your butts!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, yeah. Listen to the little servant whine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Try all you want, the day a runt like you beats us just ain't comin'.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Dang it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well? How's it taste?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is my best one to date!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've practiced it night after night.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey! Little Fuzz- BUTT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess that's a restau- rant's rat for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They're picky.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Failure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're so weak it's pathetic!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not gonna let anyone make fun of me ever again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Stupid cooks. Crap geezer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm gonna make you respect me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay! Let's see if I can improve last week's recipe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: change up the fond. Get rid of any off flavors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Chop

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They asked for Sanji Specif-ically?

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
